On this page

📃 CoolAid's Mods and Packs 📃 ​

The Ultimate List of every Mod and Pack used by CoolAid in his Hardcore World ​

📦 Mods List for CoolAid's Hardcore World 📦 ​

The following list contains every mod that CoolAid uses to keep his game smooth and aesthetically pleasing! These mods can be found on Modrinth. Any other questions, PLEASE refer to Google, not Twitch chat or Discord, thanks! Please also note that all of these mods use FabricMC. Check out fabricmc.net for information on what the Fabric toolchain is and/or how to install Fabric. All mods are, of course, 26.1 compatible!

Dependency Mods & Libraries: ​

  • Cloth Config – https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config
  • Fabric API – https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api
  • Fabric Language Kotlin – https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin
  • MaLiLib – https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib (REQUIRED FOR MODS IN RED)
  • Mod Menu – https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu
  • Skyboxify – https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify
  • YetAnotherConfigLib – https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl

Performance & Optimization Mods: ​

  • Better Block Entities https://modrinth.com/mod/better-block-entities
  • Entity Culling – https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling
  • FerriteCore – https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core
  • ImmediatelyFast – https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast
  • Lithium – https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium
  • Sodium – https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium (REQUIRED FOR MODS IN GREEN)
  • Stfu – https://modrinth.com/mod/shuttfup

Quality of Life Mods: ​

  • Armor Stands – https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-stands
  • Borderless Mining Updated – https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining-updated
  • Camera Utils – https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-utils
  • Continuity – https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity
  • Enhanced Keybinds – https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-keybinds (MADE BY ME)
  • Flashback – https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback
  • Freecam – https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam
  • Freelook – https://modrinth.com/mod/freelook
  • Gamma Utils – https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils
  • Invisible Frames – https://modrinth.com/mod/invisible-frames-mod
  • Iris Shaders – https://modrinth.com/mod/iris
  • Litematica – https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica
  • MiniHUD – https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud
  • ModernFix - https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix-mvus
  • More Mouse Tweaks – https://modrinth.com/mod/moremousetweaks
  • More Search Bars – https://modrinth.com/mod/more-search-bars (MADE BY ME)
  • Mouse Tweaks – https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks
  • NoSignGUI - https://modrinth.com/mod/disablesigngui (MADE BY ME)
  • Not Enough Animations – https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations
  • Particle Rain – https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain
  • Reese's Sodium Options – https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options
  • ShulkerBoxTooltip – https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip
  • Sodium Extra – https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra
  • SoundController – https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-controller
  • Tweakaroo – https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo
  • Village and Pillage Tweaks – https://modrinth.com/mod/vpt (MADE BY ME)
  • Xaero's World Map – https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map
  • Zoomify – https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify

🖌️ Packs List for CoolAid's Hardcore World 🖌️ ​

The following list contains every Resource Pack AND Datapack that CoolAid uses! All Datapacks can be found on the Vanilla Tweaks website, found here: vanillatweaks.net. The public packs can be found on Modrinth Any other questions, PLEASE refer to Google, not Twitch chat or Discord, thanks! Please note that the Wandering Trades pack is fully PRIVATE and custom-made, made by CoolAid. All packs are, of course, 26.1 compatible!

Resource Packs: ​

  • Custom CoolAid Pack – (PRIVATE - Custom textures made by 58shimmer)
  • Hyper Realistic Sky
  • Santa Traders by MandaLin
  • Tasty Items
  • Vanilla Tweaks - (COMPILED OF VARIOUS PACKS)

Hardcore World Datapacks: ​

  • Anti-Enderman Grief
  • Dropper to Dispenser
  • Fast Leaf Decay
  • More Mob Heads
  • Universal Dying
  • Unlock all Recipes
  • Wandering Trader Announcements
  • Wandering Trades
